creator: james@french.id.au
text:
Created attachment 251521
Patch to 1.24

Maintainer patch to bring py-puremagic up to date, apologies I've been a bit lax on submitting patches for this port due to life events.

Version 1.24 Changes from Version 1.14

 - Adding .what() to be a drop in replacement for imghdr.what()
 - Adding Test on Python 3.13 beta
 - Adding from future import annotations
 - Fixing Confidence sorting
 - Fixing MP3 Detection improvements
 - Adding magic data for JPEG XS
 - Adding Multi-part checks with negative offsets
 - Fixing encoding warning
 - Adding details for ZSoft .pcx files
 - Adding details for JXL files
 - Adding missing py.typed file
 - Fixing magic data for GIF images
 - Adding support for multi-part header checks
 - Fixing matches for webp
 - Fixing matches for epub
 - Adding fix for resetting the stream after reading part of it
